title: Pretty Cure Super Stars!
original_title: 映画 プリキュアスーパースターズ！
overview: Hana, Harry, and Hugtan waiting in front of some train tracks for Saaya and Homare. At the same time, Saaya and Homare are trying to get through the train station. The theme song then plays over a montage of Hana waiting and the former. As the story progresses, Hana meets the Kira Kira Cures after Hugtan decides to wheel away on a trolley wheeler. They eventually stop Hugtan.

trailers.title: 映画プリキュアスーパースターズ！予告

trailer_groups.title: 映画プリキュアスーパースターズ！予告
